sections.title: A: Word Formation
sections.instructions: Use the word given in capitals at the end of each line to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

items.sentence: My brother has a huge comic book (1) ...... . One of his favourite (2) ...... is Spider-Man. He started buying comics during his (3) ...... and now he has hundreds. Some of the stories are full of exciting (4) ...... scenes, while others are more funny than dramatic. He often visits comic fairs with other (5) ...... and sometimes dresses as famous characters. He says comics are great (6) ...... and help him relax after school. Last month, he even met a well-known comic book (7) ...... who signed one of his books. He's also becoming a serious comic (8) ...... and spends all his pocket money on rare editions.

sections.title: B: Complete using the verbs in the box
sections.instructions: Complete using the correct form of the verbs in the box. You have to use one word twice.

items.sentence: Everyone was nervous, but the singer told the band to ...... on playing.
Can you ...... the radio down a bit? I'm trying to study.
The referee ...... the player off after the dangerous tackle.
We usually ...... out on Saturdays because nobody wants to cook.
That's my favourite song! ...... it up!
Sophie ...... up gymnastics when she started university.
After a short break, the match ...... on until sunset.
Why don't you ...... up tennis? It's great exercise.

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
Emily really loves rock music. **keen**
Emily ...... rock music.

My dad sailed around the world when he was younger. **sailor**
My dad ...... when he was younger.

Do you want to play a board game? **feel**
Do you ...... a board game?

Harry participated in the school concert last month. **part**
Harry ...... in the school concert last month.
My sister ...... basketball every Friday after school.
Look! The children ...... in the snow.
I ...... this film is really funny.
We ...... to that campsite every summer when I was little.
Tom ...... TV when the lights went out.
I ...... play chess every day, but now I don't have time.
They ...... football when it started raining heavily.
She ...... how to play the piano very well.
Our class ...... the quiz competition yesterday.
He ...... live in London before moving abroad.
How often ...... video games?
I ...... what this word means.
While we ...... dinner, somebody knocked at the door.
My cousin ...... the drums in a school band.
They ...... go swimming in the river when they were children.

sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

We ...... part in a singing competition last month.
